   },
   "source": [
    "# セグメント解析: 可視化\n",
    "\n",
    "`SegmentTable` は豊富な描画機能を提供します。特に `overlay_spectra()` は、複数セグメント間のスペクトルを美しく比較するために最適化されています。\n",
    "\n",
    "ここでも区間そのものは `gwpy.segments.Segment`、重ね描きするスペクトルは GWpy の `FrequencySeries` を使います。gwexpy はそれらの GWpy 基盤クラスを `SegmentTable` にまとめ、可視化や色分け、俯瞰レイアウトを表処理として追加しています。基礎関係は [SegmentTable: 基本](intro_segment_table.ipynb) を参照してください。\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "d0397f17",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-29T13:26:52.239389Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-29T13:26:52.238989Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-29T13:27:00.154077Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-29T13:27:00.151165Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 7.92444,
     "end_time": "2026-04-29T13:27:00.157409+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-29T13:26:52.232969+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Plot size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import warnings\n",
    "\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=UserWarning)\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=DeprecationWarning)\n",
    "\n",
    "import warnings\n",
    "\n",
    "with warnings.catch_warnings():\n",
    "    warnings.simplefilter('ignore')\n",
    "\n",
    "    import numpy as np\n",
    "    from gwpy.frequencyseries import FrequencySeries\n",
    "    from gwpy.segments import Segment\n",
    "\n",
    "    from gwexpy.table import SegmentTable\n",
    "\n",
    "    def make_fs(i):\n",
    "        f = np.linspace(1, 32, 256)\n",
    "        data = (1.0/(f**1.5)) * (1.0 + i*0.1)\n",
    "        return FrequencySeries(data, frequencies=f)\n",
    "\n",
    "    segs = [Segment(i*100, i*100+100) for i in range(10)]\n",
    "    st = SegmentTable.from_segments(segs, snr=np.random.uniform(5, 20, 10))\n",
    "    st.add_series_column(\"asd\", data=[make_fs(i) for i in range(10)], kind=\"frequencyseries\")\n",
    "\n",
    "    # 1. Overlay spectra graded by start time (default)\n",
    "    plot = st.overlay_spectra(\"asd\", color_by=\"t0\")\n",
    "    plot\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "58f29ea4",

   },
   "source": [
    "## メタデータ列による色付け\n",
    "\n",
    "任意の数値メタデータ（例：SNR）に基づいて、各行のラインに色をつけることができます。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "d9bc235c",
   "metadata": {

   "source": [
    "plot = st.overlay_spectra(\"asd\", color_by=\"snr\", cmap=\"plasma\")\n",
    "plot"
   ]

    "## 俯瞰レイアウト\n",
    "\n",
    "`segments()` を使用して、テーブルの時間的なレイアウトを確認します。"
   ]
  },
